---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an exchange, an endpoint or a connectivity capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case you can't express today.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see — a new exchange, market type, order type or endpoint, a
streaming/order-book capability, or a binding API.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways you've tried to achieve this.

**Additional context**
Links, exchange API references or prior art.
